creator: ohauer@gmx.de
text:
old distfile is no longer fetechable

Fix: 

--- Makefile    2009/03/29 14:07:56     1.1
+++ Makefile    2009/03/29 14:08:27
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #

 PORTNAME=      SVN-Hooks
-PORTVERSION=   0.14.21
+PORTVERSION=   0.15.41
 CATEGORIES=    devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=  CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX= p5-
--- distinfo    2009/03/29 14:07:51     1.1
+++ distinfo    2009/03/29 14:11:36
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (SVN-Hooks-0.14.21.tar.gz) = a7f34e7d9afff65b337a80e72aff69ba
-SHA256 (SVN-Hooks-0.14.21.tar.gz) = 2ab03bdfad9aba6a49a6c62bff4dad8bb9d1fce717204fb839746e8ae523f999
-SIZE (SVN-Hooks-0.14.21.tar.gz) = 26781
+MD5 (SVN-Hooks-0.15.41.tar.gz) = 8e3e41343a47ffe22a6419f6781912df
+SHA256 (SVN-Hooks-0.15.41.tar.gz) = 8d7e2a628644dfc8a00b982746515a453ac07ab42f8988863e1195862a3e203c
